mission_summary: Deploy and enforce the Enhanced Agent Harness across ALL AI models on this machine — three-layer deterministic control (Harness, Deterministic Guards, Agents) with state machine discipline, builder/verifier separation, and evidence-first verification

architecture.layer_1_harness: Deterministic outer loop — controls session lifecycle, phase transitions, blocking, notifications
architecture.layer_2_guards: Bash scripts — loop detection, phase validation, known-fix matching, test execution. No LLM.
architecture.layer_3_agents: LLM agents (Planner, Generator, Evaluator) — operate ONLY within constraints set by Layers 1-2

governing_principle: Never use Layer 3 for something Layer 2 can do. Never use Layer 2 for something Layer 1 should control.
state_machine: REQUESTED -> CONTRACT_LOCKED -> IMPLEMENTED -> VERIFIED -> ACCEPTED (with STUCK escalation from any active state)

gemma_3_4b.compensation: Anti-commentary directives, multi-turn format, Gemma-optimal parameters

enforcement_distinction.soft: Instructions in markdown — advisory, degrades under context pressure
enforcement_distinction.hard: Bash scripts and hooks — deterministic, runs outside LLM
enforcement_distinction.harness: Outer loop — controls what agent sees, when sessions start/stop, whether agent can proceed

source_documents: Harness big idea.txt — Architecture evolution through developer pushback
making th enhanced agent harnes and the new big Idea work together.txt — Integration blueprint

retention_policies.working/: Clear at session end except active-tasks.json
retention_policies.semantic/: Keep forever, update on new information
retention_policies.procedural/: Keep forever, flag unused after 90 days
